query:
SELECT indexador, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as outliers
FROM spread_analysis
GROUP BY indexador
ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT codigoCetip, emissorNome, indexador, rating, durationAnos, zspread, isOutlier
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE isOutlier = 1;
